label: UTA News — 10th Annual AI & Analytics Symposium
description: Quoted in the official UTA College of Business news release covering the 10th Annual AI & Analytics Symposium, where ReRhythm placed as second runner-up.
publication: University of Texas at Arlington — College of Business
quote: Through this competition, I was able to apply cutting-edge skills like AI, cloud computing, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to solve an actual business problem, which is exactly the kind of hands-on learning experience that sets UTA apart.

label: 3rd Place — Analytics Symposium, UTA 2025
description: Recognised at the UTA Analytics Symposium for ReRhythm, an AI-powered career coaching platform built on AWS Bedrock, ECS Fargate, and DynamoDB.
author: Samuel Mamootil
authorTitle: Cloud & Platform Engineer · MBA Student at UTA
postText: 🏆 Thrilled to share that our team placed 3rd at the UTA Analytics Symposium 2025 with ReRhythm — an AI-powered 28-day career coaching platform built on AWS Bedrock (Claude), ECS Fargate, Textract, and DynamoDB. Grateful for the incredible teammates and mentors who made this possible. #AWS #AI #UTA #ReRhythm
